input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.13.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.13.1.2
            TITLE: the completed inspection sticker denotes the inspection approval

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.13.1.2: The completed Inspection Sticker denotes the Inspection Approval
IN.13.1.2 The completed Inspection Sticker denotes the Inspection Approval

final_answer: The completed Inspection Sticker denotes the Inspection Approval
